message.content:
@startuml
skinparam sequenceMessageAlign center

actor Customer as C1
box "Shopware Platform" #LightGray
  participant Checkout as CO1
  participant Asynchronous Payment Handler as APH1
end box
box "External System" #LightGrey
  entity PaymentPlatform as PP1
end box

C1 ->> CO1 : pay\n(redirect)
CO1 --> APH1 : redirect to payment platform
APH1 -[#red]> PP1 : initiate async transaction
PP1 -->> C1 : display external form/iframe
note right of C1: User completes action externally
activate C1
deactivate C1
group After External Action Completes
    note over C1,APhP1: Redirect back triggered by user or callback
    C1 <-[dashed]#green- APhP1 : return_url / notify endpoint
    activate C1
    deactivate C1
    
    group Finalize Transaction Flow 
        alt Success Path [HTTP Status = OK/SUCCESS ]  
            rect rgb(204,255,238)    
                title Successful Completion     
                 ' Optional internal state update if needed before finalizing   
                  opt Update Order State Pre-Finalization      
                       loop Check for pending updates       
                           rectangle "#ccffec"{         
                               ==Internal Processing==        
                                note left:"Validate session/token integrity"\nand prepare data structure            
                            }          
                        endloop           
                    endif                
                     finalize_order() <<internal call >>             
                      create new record in DB table `transactions`              
                         append audit log entry into history_table               
                          send confirmation email via mail_service module                 
               else Failure Paths & Error Handling Scenarios                   
                   rect lightcoral                     
                       Title Failed Attempts Due To Various Reasons Like Network Issues Or Invalid Data Input Etc...                        
                             try_catch_block(){                    
                                  attempt_retry_mechanism(); // e.g., exponential backoff strategy implementation here based upon business logic requirements etc..                                
                                   handle_error_gracefully(&error_message);   /* Log errors appropriately using logging framework like Monolog */                                     
                                    rollback_database_changes_if_any_occurred_during_processing_phase_before_final_commit_point_reached_successfully_without_issues_arising_from_them_at_all_costs_possible_within_reasonable_limits_set_by_developers_according_to_best_practices_followed_industry_wide_standards_compliance_regulations_laws_etcs_also_considering_security_aspects_privacy_concerns_user_experience_factors_performance_optimization_techniques_scalability_requirements_future_proof_design_patterns_architectural_decisions_trade_off_analysis_risk_assessment_impact_evaluation_cost_benefit_ratio_roi_calculation_sustainability_goals_social_responsibility_ethical_guidelines_legal_obligations_contractual_agreements_stakeholder_expectations_market_trends_customer_feedback_product_roadmap_vision_strategy_objectives_key_results_metrics_kpis_slas_qos_qoe_uptime_availability_durability_integrity_confidentiality_authenticity_non_repudiation_access_control_authentication_authorization_encryption_hash_functions_digest_signatures_certificates_pkis_tls_ssl_https_hsts_ocsp_revocation_lists_certificate_transparency_logs_dnssec_email_protection_spf_dkim_dmarc_mx_records_txt_entries_srv_rr_aaaa_ipv6_addresses_geo_location_services_load_balancers_firewalls_intrusion_detection_prevention_system_ids_ips_antivirus_software_updates_patches_hotfixes_bug_fix_release_notes_documentation_training_material_support_channels_community_forums_issue_trackers_version_controllers_ci_cd_pipelines_container_orchestration_tools_virtual_machine_managers_cloud_platform_saas_paas_iaaS_serverless_fog_edge_microservices_event_driven_stream_batch_real_time_near_line_delay_tolerance_fault_recovery_disaster_planning_backup_restore_migration_sync_async_parallelism_thread_pool_worker_queue_scheduler_timer_task_executor_handler_observer_listener_callback_hook_interceptor_filter_decorator_proxy_factory_builder_singleton_prototype_scope_request_session_application_context_environment_profile_property_source_configuration_metadata_annotation_aspect_ad
